[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101110101 6
1 110100010 4
2 111001111 7
3 111111110 8
4 111111111 a
5 011111011 7
6 111111110 8
7 111101100 6

01 10 000000010 1
12 21 000000010 1
23 32 001000011 3
34 43 001000010 2
45 54 101100100 4
56 65 100100000 2
67 76 100000001 2
70 07 000000010 1

02 20 000000010 1
13 31 000010010 2
24 42 011100010 4
35 53 001000000 1
46 64 100100000 2
57 75 100000000 1
60 06 000000000 a
71 17 100000010 2

03 30 000000010 1
14 41 100000110 3
25 52 001100000 2
36 63 000010001 2
47 74 100000010 2
50 05 000000000 a
61 16 100010000 2
72 27 000000011 2

04 40 000000010 1
15 51 100000100 2
26 62 000100001 2
37 73 000000011 2
